validation.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters
validation.usernameFormat: Username must contain both letters and numbers, allowed characters: . _ @ -
validation.emailAtSymbol: Email must contain exactly one @ symbol
validation.emailLocalPartLength: The part before @ must not exceed 64 characters
validation.emailConsecutiveDots: Email must not contain consecutive dots
validation.emailDotPosition: Email must not start or end with a dot
validation.passwordLength: Password must be more than 8 characters
validation.passwordFormat: Password must contain both letters and numbers

error.unknown: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.internalServer: The system is busy or unavailable. Please try again later.
error.fieldCodeExisted: Field code already exists in this topic.
error.notGroupLeader: Only the group leader can perform this action.
error.generalRoadmapExists: A general roadmap already exists for this group.
error.generalRoadmapExistsWorkspace: A general roadmap already exists for this workspace.
error.quizNotInGroup: Quiz does not belong to this group.
error.quizUpdateLockedAfterAttempt: Quiz has attempts. Only status, title, and max attempts can be updated.
error.accountNotFoundByEmail: No account found with this email.
error.alreadyGroupMember: User is already a group member.
error.invitationAlreadySent: Invitation has already been sent and is pending.
error.groupMemberLimitReached: Group member limit reached for your subscription.
error.planDisplayNameExisted: A plan with this display name already exists. Please choose a different name.
error.lastSuperAdminProtected: Cannot update or remove the last super admin.
error.paymentNotPending: Payment is not in pending status.
error.adminCannotUseUserFeatures: Only regular users can create groups, workspaces and use user features. Admin and Super Admin do not have this permission.
error.planFeatureNotSupported: This feature is not supported by your plan.
error.insufficientCredit: Insufficient credit balance. Please top up to continue.
error.defaultPlanExistsForType: A default plan already exists for this type.
error.invalidChallengeTime: Start time must be before end time.
error.challengeTimeMustBeFuture: Time must be in the future.
error.challengeAlreadyJoined: You have already joined this challenge. Each person can only join once.
error.challengeNotScheduled: Challenge is not scheduled yet. Cannot join.
error.challengeNotJoinable: Challenge is no longer accepting participants.
error.challengeCannotStart: Only Leader/Contributor can start the challenge.
error.challengeParticipantNotFound: You have not joined this challenge.
error.challengeNotPlaying: Challenge has not started or you are not in PLAYING state.
error.defaultPlanCannotUpdateType: Default plan type cannot be updated.
error.quizAttemptNotInProgress: Quiz attempt is not in progress.
error.questionNotInQuiz: Question does not belong to this quiz.
error.answerNotBelongToQuestion: Answer does not belong to this question.

hero.subtitle: Upload your study materials (PDFs, Videos, or URLs) and let our AI build personalized roadmaps and interactive quizzes.

features.title: Revolutionize Your Learning Journey
features.roadmapDesc: Our AI analyzes your materials and generates a step-by-step learning path from basics to advanced.
features.quizDesc: Generate multiple-choice or essay questions instantly from any PDF, YouTube video.
features.companionDesc: Interact with your AI tutor via voice to clear doubts and explain complex concepts in real-time.

testimonials.title: What our students are saying 😍
testimonials.student1Quote: "QuizMate AI completely changed how I prepare for my exams. Generating quizzes from lecture videos is a game changer!"
testimonials.student2Quote: "The AI Roadmap is incredible. It broke down my 200-page textbook into 10 logical learning phases. Highly recommend!"

footer.brandDesc: Empowering students worldwide with AI-driven study tools for a smarter future.
footer.copyright: © 2026 QuizMate AI. Built with intelligence for learners.

pricingGuide.title: How credit pricing works in QuizmateAI
pricingGuide.subtitle: QuizmateAI does not bill by feature name alone. Credits are calculated from actual AI usage so users can understand what they pay for before they run a job.
pricingGuide.creditCardDescription: The unit used to convert AI usage into something simple to buy, understand, and budget.
pricingGuide.lightRequestHint: A light request such as a 20-question mixed quiz can be around 20-21 credits. OCR and add-ons increase the total.

summaryCards.title: 1 credit
summaryCards.desc: Current starting recommendation is 100 VND per credit.

summaryCards.title: Capability bundle
summaryCards.desc: Price by AI capability groups such as OCR, source understanding, quiz generation, and review.

summaryCards.title: No double charge
summaryCards.desc: If a higher-level package already includes lower-level processing, the UI should not bill that capability twice.

summaryCards.title: Estimate
summaryCards.desc: Show an estimate first, settle against actual usage, and refund unused credits.

pricingGuide.bundleDesc: The system currently uses a simple pricing model so users can understand and estimate quickly. Each source type has one basic credit rule based on its main unit.
pricingGuide.unitTitle: Credit table for core AI features
pricingGuide.unitDesc: This table keeps only the core AI features so users can estimate cost more easily. For quizzes, pricing is based only on total question count, not on individual question types or per-question configs.
pricingGuide.personalizationDesc: These are basic and easy-to-understand suggestions that fit the current system scope.

personalizationItems.title: AI quiz suggestion
personalizationItems.description: AI suggests the next quiz set based on recent study history and results.

personalizationItems.title: AI recommends topics to review
personalizationItems.description: AI points out which topics the learner should review first.

personalizationItems.title: AI material suggestion
personalizationItems.description: AI recommends study materials related to the learner's current topic.

pricingGuide.examplesDesc: These short examples help users estimate credits quickly before running a feature.

examples.title: Upload a 5-page PDF
examples.body: If the system reads and processes all 5 PDF pages, you can estimate the cost directly by page count.

examples.title: Generate a 10-question quiz
examples.body: For a basic quiz set, the fastest estimate is to count the number of questions generated.

examples.title: Generate 20 flashcards
examples.body: Basic flashcards can be estimated by the number of cards created.

examples.title: Paste 2,500 words of TEXT
examples.body: For text input, the system charges by the total number of words being processed.

examples.title: Upload a 4,200-word DOCUMENT
examples.body: Documents are also priced by word count instead of per file.

examples.title: Generate a 25-question quiz
examples.body: Quiz pricing now depends only on total question count, not on individual question types.

examples.title: AI feedback after 1 quiz
examples.body: After finishing a quiz, the learner can request AI feedback for that attempt.

examples.title: Generate 3 roadmap phases
examples.body: When AI is used to create roadmap phases, pricing is based on the number of phases generated.

examples.title: Generate 8 knowledge nodes in a phase
examples.body: Knowledge inside a phase is charged separately by the number of generated knowledge nodes.

pricingGuide.examplesNote: These numbers are simple estimates to help users understand the cost before running a feature.

wallet.title: Quizmate Credits
wallet.subtitle: Check balance, buy more Credits, and view your transaction history.
wallet.hint: Credits are used for AI-powered features in QuizMate.
wallet.buySubtitle: Pick a package to keep using AI features.

upgradePlan.title: Upgrade Subscription
upgradePlan.individualDesc: Choose an individual plan that fits your needs
upgradePlan.groupDesc: Choose a group plan to upgrade your team
upgradePlan.noLeaderGroups: You are not a leader of any group.
